subject: A quick win for Munson AC's customer follow-up
body:
Hi,

I came across Munson Air Conditioning and could tell you've built a solid reputation in the Orlando area.

One thing I noticed is that your website primarily drives phone calls. We help HVAC companies capture leads 24/7 by adding smart intake forms and automated text/email follow-ups. Your customers can request service at midnight and get an instant confirmation, and your team handles it in the morning.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
